stemHtml:
According to the following TAF, which of the following is the time period between 06:00 UTC and 21:00 UTC on the 14th day of the month during which a pilot can fly without expecting any type of precipitation?

EDDF 140500Z 1406/1512 VRB02KT CAVOK BECMG 1408/1410 13008KT 9999 SCT040 TEMPO 1411/1413 25010KT 8000 SHRA SCT033 TCU PROB30 TEMPO 1413/1415 27010KT 5000 TSRA SCT027CB BECMG 1415/1417 29015KT 7000 SHRA OVC015 BECMG 1503/1506 31010KT 8000 -RA BKN025 BECMG 1509/1512 9999 SCT030=
